mapper.sql: es.id, es.equipment_id, es.equipment_name, es.category, es.serial_number, es.storage_location, es.stored_at, es.remarks, es.created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM equipment_storage es WHERE es.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY es.stored_at DESC
SELECT FROM equipment_storage es WHERE es.id = #{id} AND es.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO equipment_storage (equipment_id, equipment_name, category, serial_number, storage_location, stored_at, remarks, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{equipmentId}, #{equipmentName}, #{category}, #{serialNumber}, #{storageLocation}, #{storedAt}, #{remarks}, NOW(), NOW())
